previousDayImpact: Morocco's performance provided a significant boost for Team Pahl and Team Mack, creating separation from the rest of the field.
The Netherlands draw was a widely held pick that provided a small, uniform point gain for eight different entries, limiting its impact on the standings.
leaderboardSummary: Team Pahl surged into the lead, climbing two spots to take first place after a strong 13-point gain.
Team Godfather fell to second place despite a 9-point gain, as Team Pahl's momentum pushed them ahead.
Team Mack saw the largest climb of the day, jumping three spots to seventh place thanks to their unique stake in Morocco.
leverageWatch: Team Jordan and Team Megatronless have a high-leverage opportunity with Norway, as they are the only entries with a stake in today's first match.
Team Godfather and Bijan Mustard are both invested in France, while Team Mack, Team Choo Choo, and Hubba Hubba CD's Nutz have conflicting interests in the Ecuador vs. Mexico match.
